raw_entries.text: Match ends, IR Iran 2, New Zealand 2.
Second Half ends, IR Iran 2, New Zealand 2.
Ali Alipour (IR Iran) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Ryan Thomas (New Zealand).
Foul by Mehdi Ghayedi (IR Iran).
Tyler Bindon (New Zealand) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Corner, IR Iran. Conceded by Callan Elliot.
Substitution, New Zealand. Jesse Randall replaces Sarpreet Singh.
Substitution, New Zealand. Tyler Bindon replaces Marko Stamenic.
Attempt saved. Chris Wood (New Zealand) header from the centre of the box is saved in the top centre of the goal by Alireza Beiranvand (IR Iran). Assisted by Jesse Randall with a cross.
Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.
Attempt missed. Ali Nemati (IR Iran) left footed shot from the centre of the box misses to the left following a corner.
Foul by Ehsan Hajisafi (IR Iran).
Elijah Just (New Zealand) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Ehsan Hajisafi (IR Iran) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Ehsan Hajisafi (IR Iran) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Marko Stamenic (New Zealand).
Attempt blocked. Ali Alipour (IR Iran) left footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked.
Attempt missed. Saeid Ezatolahi (IR Iran) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right.
Ramin Rezaeian (IR Iran) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Saeid Ezatolahi (IR Iran).
Ryan Thomas (New Zealand) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt missed. Finn Surman (New Zealand) header from very close range is high and wide to the right following a set piece situation.
Attempt missed. Mehdi Taremi (IR Iran) header from the centre of the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Ramin Rezaeian with a cross.
Substitution, IR Iran. Amirhossein Hosseinzadeh replaces Mehdi Taremi.
Delay over. They are ready to continue.
Substitution, New Zealand. Callan Elliot replaces Tim Payne.

Attempt blocked. Ehsan Hajisafi (IR Iran) left footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Mehdi Taremi.
Tim Payne (New Zealand) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Attempt blocked. Mohammad Mohebbi (IR Iran) right footed shot from the left side of the box is blocked. Assisted by Mehdi Ghayedi.
Substitution, New Zealand. Ryan Thomas replaces Callum McCowatt.
Substitution, New Zealand. Ben Old replaces Liberato Cacace.
Delay in match for a drinks break.
Corner, IR Iran. Conceded by Michael Boxall.
Foul by Ali Nemati (IR Iran).
Max Crocombe (New Zealand) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Substitution, IR Iran. Ehsan Hajisafi replaces Saman Ghoddos.
Goal! IR Iran 2, New Zealand 2. Mohammad Mohebbi (IR Iran) header from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Ramin Rezaeian with a cross.
Foul by Shoja Khalilzadeh (IR Iran).
Callum McCowatt (New Zealand) wins a free kick in the attacking half.
Attempt saved. Sarpreet Singh (New Zealand) left footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Alireza Beiranvand (IR Iran). Assisted by Chris Wood.
Mehdi Ghayedi (IR Iran) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Foul by Tim Payne (New Zealand).

Foul by Ali Alipour (IR Iran).
Finn Surman (New Zealand) wins a free kick in the defensive half.
Goal! IR Iran 1, New Zealand 2. Elijah Just (New Zealand) right footed shot from the right side of the box to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Chris Wood following a fast break.
Substitution, IR Iran. Ali Alipour replaces Shahriyar Moghanloo.
Attempt missed. Shahriyar Moghanloo (IR Iran) left footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the left. Assisted by Ramin Rezaeian.
Attempt blocked. Mehdi Ghayedi (IR Iran) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Ali Nemati with a headed pass.
Corner, IR Iran. Conceded by Tim Payne.
Attempt missed. Chris Wood (New Zealand) right footed shot from outside the box is high and wide to the right. Assisted by Max Crocombe.
Substitution, IR Iran. Mehdi Ghayedi replaces Arya Yousefi.

Foul by Elijah Just (New Zealand).

Attempt saved. Callum McCowatt (New Zealand) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Alireza Beiranvand (IR Iran). Assisted by Chris Wood.
